TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: A-lin A-lin, u ngangan nu Pangcah sa ci Lisang Pacidal Koyouan, u ngangan nu Hulam sa ci ÈªÉÈ∫óÁé≤. nalecuhan ciniza i 1983 a mihcaan, 9 a bulad, 20 a demiad. nalecuh i Kaoshongse Linyachu. u wawa nu Pangcah. namaala yadah ku kaulah u ÈáëÊõ≤Áçé nu Taywan. zuma satu namudadiw ciniza i tina pakaulahay a kakitizaan. u kawaw niza 1999 a mihcaan, mudadiw ciniza tu Nantou 921 ninel malabadesay a wawa, maazih tunu Á∂ìÁ¥Ä‰∫∫ ci Jason. sepat a mihcaan sa, tina tatusaay malitemuh i EZ5, mukan tu pahay a patyamay, sisa miketun tina tatusaay i 2005 a mihcaan 4 a bulad 15 a demiad. kya niketunay a lacul sa, u cacay a bataan a mihcaan misanga' siwa nalimaan . palaacawa atu musabilil namulecuh 2007 a mihcaan 5 a bulad, namacumud ciniza tu ÈáëÊõ≤Áçé sakapahay a baluhayay a mudadiway. 6 a bulad sa, patahkal sakacacay a EP nalimaan. nazikuzaan sa, zayhan palaacawa atu namulecuh lalekalan , matenes caay patahkal tu nalimaan. 2008 a mihcaan 8 a bulad, patahkal tu ciniza sakatusa a nalimaan, macumud ciniza tu ÈáëÊõ≤Áçé sakapahay a tatayna mudadiway. nalimaan 2006-02-10 Â§±ÊàÄÁÑ°ÁΩ™ milemu' caay siilu 2008-08-15 Â§©ÁîüÊ≠åÂß¨ u tatenga'ay a tatayna mudadiway 2009-12-28 ‰ª•Ââç‰ª•Âæå naayaway atu nazikuzazan 2010-12-24 ÂØÇÂØû‰∏çÁóõ aniwiw caykaadada' 2011-11-18 ÊàëÂÄëÊúÉÊõ¥Â•ΩÁöÑ amakapahtu kami 2012-12-30 Âπ∏Á¶è‰∫ÜÁÑ∂ÂæåÂë¢ sakadahitu uzuma i ? 2014-12-30 ÁΩ™ÊÉ°ÊÑü siilu i balucu' 2017-09-20 A-lin
S.PHON: a-r~…æin a-r~…æin, u ≈ãa≈ãan nu pa≈ã ¶aƒß sa ¶i r~…æisa≈ã pa ¶idar~…æ kojouan, u ≈ãa≈ãan nu ƒßur~…æam sa ¶i ***. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i **** a miƒß ¶aan, * a bur~…æad, ** a d…ômiad. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i kaosƒßo≈ãs…ô r~…æinja ¶ƒßu. u wawa nu pa≈ã ¶aƒß. namaar~…æa jadaƒß ku kaur~…æaƒß u *** nu tajwan. zuma satu namudadiw ¶iniza i tina pakaur~…æaƒßaj a kakitizaan. u kawaw niza **** a miƒß ¶aan, mudadiw ¶iniza tu nantou *** nin…ôr~…æ mar~…æabad…ôsaj a wawa, maaziƒß tunu *** ¶i *ason. s…ôpat a miƒß ¶aan sa, tina tatusaaj mar~…æit…ômuƒß i …ôz*, mukan tu paƒßaj a patjamaj, sisa mik…ôtun tina tatusaaj i **** a miƒß ¶aan * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad. kja nik…ôtunaj a r~…æa ¶ur~…æ sa, u ¶a ¶aj a bataan a miƒß ¶aan misa≈ãa î~ ° siwa nar~…æimaan . par~…æaa ¶awa atu musabir~…æir~…æ namur~…æ…ô ¶uƒß **** a miƒß ¶aan * a bur~…æad, nama ¶umud ¶iniza tu *** sakapaƒßaj a bar~…æuƒßajaj a mudadiwaj. * a bur~…æad sa, pataƒßkar~…æ saka ¶a ¶aj a …ôp nar~…æimaan. nazikuzaan sa, zajƒßan par~…æaa ¶awa atu namur~…æ…ô ¶uƒß r~…æar~…æ…ôkar~…æan , mat…ôn…ôs ¶aaj pataƒßkar~…æ tu nar~…æimaan. **** a miƒß ¶aan * a bur~…æad, pataƒßkar~…æ tu ¶iniza sakatusa a nar~…æimaan, ma ¶umud ¶iniza tu *** sakapaƒßaj a tatajna mudadiwaj. nar~…æimaan ****-**-** **** mir~…æ…ômu î~ ° ¶aaj siir~…æu ****-**-** **** u tat…ô≈ãa î~ °aj a tatajna mudadiwaj ****-**-** **** naajawaj atu nazikuzazan ****-**-** **** aniwiw ¶ajkaadada î~ ° ****-**-** ****** amakapaƒßtu kami ****-**-** ****** sakadaƒßitu uzuma i ? ****-**-** *** siir~…æu i bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° ****-**-** a-r~…æin
S.FORM: A-lin A-lin, u ngangan nu Pangcah sa ci Lisang Pacidal Koyouan, u ngangan nu Hulam sa ci ÈªÉÈ∫óÁé≤. nalecuhan ciniza i 1983 a mihcaan, 9 a bulad, 20 a demiad. nalecuh i Kaoshongse Linyachu. u wawa nu Pangcah. namaala yadah ku kaulah u ÈáëÊõ≤Áçé nu Taywan. zuma satu namudadiw ciniza i tina pakaulahay a kakitizaan. u kawaw niza 1999 a mihcaan, mudadiw ciniza tu Nantou 921 ninel malabadesay a wawa, maazih tunu Á∂ìÁ¥Ä‰∫∫ ci Jason. sepat a mihcaan sa, tina tatusaay malitemuh i EZ5, mukan tu pahay a patyamay, sisa miketun tina tatusaay i 2005 a mihcaan 4 a bulad 15 a demiad. kya niketunay a lacul sa, u cacay a bataan a mihcaan misanga' siwa nalimaan . palaacawa atu musabilil namulecuh 2007 a mihcaan 5 a bulad, namacumud ciniza tu ÈáëÊõ≤Áçé sakapahay a baluhayay a mudadiway. 6 a bulad sa, patahkal sakacacay a EP nalimaan. nazikuzaan sa, zayhan palaacawa atu namulecuh lalekalan , matenes caay patahkal tu nalimaan. 2008 a mihcaan 8 a bulad, patahkal tu ciniza sakatusa a nalimaan, macumud ciniza tu ÈáëÊõ≤Áçé sakapahay a tatayna mudadiway. nalimaan 2006-02-10 Â§±ÊàÄÁÑ°ÁΩ™ milemu' caay siilu 2008-08-15 Â§©ÁîüÊ≠åÂß¨ u tatenga'ay a tatayna mudadiway 2009-12-28 ‰ª•Ââç‰ª•Âæå naayaway atu nazikuzazan 2010-12-24 ÂØÇÂØû‰∏çÁóõ aniwiw caykaadada' 2011-11-18 ÊàëÂÄëÊúÉÊõ¥Â•ΩÁöÑ amakapahtu kami 2012-12-30 Âπ∏Á¶è‰∫ÜÁÑ∂ÂæåÂë¢ sakadahitu uzuma i ? 2014-12-30 ÁΩ™ÊÉ°ÊÑü siilu i balucu' 2017-09-20 A-lin
S.PHON: a-r~…æin a-r~…æin, u ≈ãa≈ãan nu pa≈ã ¶aƒß sa ¶i r~…æisa≈ã pa ¶idar~…æ kojouan, u ≈ãa≈ãan nu ƒßur~…æam sa ¶i ***. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i **** a miƒß ¶aan, * a bur~…æad, ** a d…ômiad. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i kaosƒßo≈ãs…ô r~…æinja ¶ƒßu. u wawa nu pa≈ã ¶aƒß. namaar~…æa jadaƒß ku kaur~…æaƒß u *** nu tajwan. zuma satu namudadiw ¶iniza i tina pakaur~…æaƒßaj a kakitizaan. u kawaw niza **** a miƒß ¶aan, mudadiw ¶iniza tu nantou *** nin…ôr~…æ mar~…æabad…ôsaj a wawa, maaziƒß tunu *** ¶i *ason. s…ôpat a miƒß ¶aan sa, tina tatusaaj mar~…æit…ômuƒß i …ôz*, mukan tu paƒßaj a patjamaj, sisa mik…ôtun tina tatusaaj i **** a miƒß ¶aan * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad. kja nik…ôtunaj a r~…æa ¶ur~…æ sa, u ¶a ¶aj a bataan a miƒß ¶aan misa≈ãa î~ ° siwa nar~…æimaan . par~…æaa ¶awa atu musabir~…æir~…æ namur~…æ…ô ¶uƒß **** a miƒß ¶aan * a bur~…æad, nama ¶umud ¶iniza tu *** sakapaƒßaj a bar~…æuƒßajaj a mudadiwaj. * a bur~…æad sa, pataƒßkar~…æ saka ¶a ¶aj a …ôp nar~…æimaan. nazikuzaan sa, zajƒßan par~…æaa ¶awa atu namur~…æ…ô ¶uƒß r~…æar~…æ…ôkar~…æan , mat…ôn…ôs ¶aaj pataƒßkar~…æ tu nar~…æimaan. **** a miƒß ¶aan * a bur~…æad, pataƒßkar~…æ tu ¶iniza sakatusa a nar~…æimaan, ma ¶umud ¶iniza tu *** sakapaƒßaj a tatajna mudadiwaj. nar~…æimaan ****-**-** **** mir~…æ…ômu î~ ° ¶aaj siir~…æu ****-**-** **** u tat…ô≈ãa î~ °aj a tatajna mudadiwaj ****-**-** **** naajawaj atu nazikuzazan ****-**-** **** aniwiw ¶ajkaadada î~ ° ****-**-** ****** amakapaƒßtu kami ****-**-** ****** sakadaƒßitu uzuma i ? ****-**-** *** siir~…æu i bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° ****-**-** a-r~…æin
